title: aragallus sericeus
intro: Aragallus sericeus, also known as silver false chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual issues due to its sedative and spasmolytic effects. The health benefits of Aragallus sericeus include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Aragallus sericeus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for its medicinal properties.
